description: Foundry agent builder APIs updated to follow standard Aspire AppHost conventions: `AddPromptAgent` now takes the resource name as the first parameter (before the model), and `PublishAsHostedAgent` has been renamed to `WithComputeEnvironment` to align with other deployment targets. The preview-only `AsHostedAgent` and `RunAsHostedAgent` methods were removed.
name: Foundry agent builder API alignment with Aspire conventions
